    FROM [Items] AS [i]
    INNER JOIN (
        SELECT [s].[StockLedgerEntryId], [s].[BusinessDate], [s].[CreatedAtUtc], [s].[CreatedBy], [s].[DeletedAtUtc], [s].[DeletedBy], [s].[InQty], [s].[IsActive], [s].[IsDeleted], [s].[ItemId], [s].[OutQty], [s].[OutletId], [s].[Rate], [s].[ReferenceId], [s].[ReferenceType], [s].[Remarks], [s].[RowVersion], [s].[RunningBalance], [s].[UpdatedAtUtc], [s].[UpdatedBy]
        FROM [StockLedger] AS [s]
        WHERE [s].[IsDeleted] = CAST(0 AS bit)
    ) AS [t] ON [i].[ItemId] = [t].[ItemId]
    WHERE [i].[IsDeleted] = CAST(0 AS bit) AND [i].[OutletId] = @__outletId_0 AND [i].[IsStockTracked] = CAST(1 AS bit)
    GROUP BY [i].[ItemId], [i].[ReorderLevel]
    HAVING COALESCE((
        SELECT TOP(1) [t0].[RunningBalance]
        FROM [Items] AS [i0]
        INNER JOIN (
            SELECT [s0].[StockLedgerEntryId], [s0].[BusinessDate], [s0].[CreatedAtUtc], [s0].[CreatedBy], [s0].[DeletedAtUtc], [s0].[DeletedBy], [s0].[InQty], [s0].[IsActive], [s0].[IsDeleted], [s0].[ItemId], [s0].[OutQty], [s0].[OutletId], [s0].[Rate], [s0].[ReferenceId], [s0].[ReferenceType], [s0].[Remarks], [s0].[RowVersion], [s0].[RunningBalance], [s0].[UpdatedAtUtc], [s0].[UpdatedBy]
            FROM [StockLedger] AS [s0]
            WHERE [s0].[IsDeleted] = CAST(0 AS bit)
        ) AS [t0] ON [i0].[ItemId] = [t0].[ItemId]
        WHERE [i0].[IsDeleted] = CAST(0 AS bit) AND [i0].[OutletId] = @__outletId_0 AND [i0].[IsStockTracked] = CAST(1 AS bit) AND [i].[ItemId] = [i0].[ItemId] AND [i].[ReorderLevel] = [i0].[ReorderLevel]

) AS [t1]

SELECT [p].[PaymentMode], COALESCE(SUM([p].[Amount]), 0.0)
FROM [Payments] AS [p]
INNER JOIN (
    SELECT [b].[BillId], [b].[BusinessDate], [b].[OutletId], [b].[Status]
    FROM [Bills] AS [b]

) AS [t] ON [p].[BillId] = [t].[BillId]

SELECT COUNT(*)
FROM (
    SELECT [i].[ItemId], [i].[ReorderLevel]
    FROM [Items] AS [i]
    INNER JOIN (
        SELECT [s].[StockLedgerEntryId], [s].[BusinessDate], [s].[CreatedAtUtc], [s].[CreatedBy], [s].[DeletedAtUtc], [s].[DeletedBy], [s].[InQty], [s].[IsActive], [s].[IsDeleted], [s].[ItemId], [s].[OutQty], [s].[OutletId], [s].[Rate], [s].[ReferenceId], [s].[ReferenceType], [s].[Remarks], [s].[RowVersion], [s].[RunningBalance], [s].[UpdatedAtUtc], [s].[UpdatedBy]
        FROM [StockLedger] AS [s]
        WHERE [s].[IsDeleted] = CAST(0 AS bit)
    ) AS [t] ON [i].[ItemId] = [t].[ItemId]
    WHERE [i].[IsDeleted] = CAST(0 AS bit) AND [i].[OutletId] = @__outletId_0 AND [i].[IsStockTracked] = CAST(1 AS bit)
    GROUP BY [i].[ItemId], [i].[ReorderLevel]
    HAVING COALESCE((
        SELECT TOP(1) [t0].[RunningBalance]
        FROM [Items] AS [i0]
        INNER JOIN (
            SELECT [s0].[StockLedgerEntryId], [s0].[BusinessDate], [s0].[CreatedAtUtc], [s0].[CreatedBy], [s0].[DeletedAtUtc], [s0].[DeletedBy], [s0].[InQty], [s0].[IsActive], [s0].[IsDeleted], [s0].[ItemId], [s0].[OutQty], [s0].[OutletId], [s0].[Rate], [s0].[ReferenceId], [s0].[ReferenceType], [s0].[Remarks], [s0].[RowVersion], [s0].[RunningBalance], [s0].[UpdatedAtUtc], [s0].[UpdatedBy]
            FROM [StockLedger] AS [s0]
            WHERE [s0].[IsDeleted] = CAST(0 AS bit)
        ) AS [t0] ON [i0].[ItemId] = [t0].[ItemId]
        WHERE [i0].[IsDeleted] = CAST(0 AS bit) AND [i0].[OutletId] = @__outletId_0 AND [i0].[IsStockTracked] = CAST(1 AS bit) AND [i].[ItemId] = [i0].[ItemId] AND [i].[ReorderLevel] = [i0].[ReorderLevel]
